name: path-server
description: Fast, lightweight path autocomplete provided by Path Server

path-server.basePath.description: Base paths for relative path completion, highlight and jump. Supports `${workspaceFolder}`, `${document}`, `${userHome}` as placeholders. The order determines the priority in suggestions.

path-server.completion.maxResults.description: Max results shown in completion. 0 indicates no limit.

path-server.completion.showHiddenFiles.description: Whether to show hidden files in completion.

path-server.completion.exclude.description: List of paths to exclude from completion. Supports glob patterns.

path-server.completion.triggerNextComple.description: Whether to automatically trigger next completion after selecting an item.

path-server.highlight.enable.description: Whether to highlight paths in the editor with underlines.

path-server.highlight.highlightDirectory.description: Whether to highlight directory paths. (Jump behavior may vary by editor/OS).

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.build: npx rimraf ./dist && npx shx cp ../../README.md ./ && npx shx cp ../../LICENSE ./ && npx shx cp ../../CHANGELOG.md ./ && npx shx cp ../../assets/icon.png ./ && npx vsce package
